comment: Exchange closure calendars fetched weekly by the clock
(see marketHolidays.cpp - MARKET_HOLIDAYS_URL points at the raw GitHub
URL of this file). Update this file when an exchange publishes next
year's schedule and every device picks it up within a week - no
Format: holidays.<EXCHANGE> = array of YYYYMMDD integers, weekday
full-day closures only (weekends are handled by the market-status
logic). earlyCloses.<EXCHANGE> = array of 'YYYYMMDD:HHMM' strings for
half days - the exchange trades normally until HHMM local time, then
closes (e.g. '20261224:1300' = 1:00 PM close on Christmas Eve).
An exchange listed under holidays fully replaces its compiled-in
tables (holidays AND early closes); an exchange omitted there keeps
the compiled-in fallback for both. earlyCloses entries are ignored
for exchanges not listed under holidays. Max 8 exchanges, 88 holiday
SSE State Council holiday schedule | TSE https://www.jpx.co.jp |
